languages.text: "Наивность низших... безгранична. Он алкал... знаний. Он... присвоил мой инструмент. Он... погубил второго... и пробудил... спящих". {n}Металлическая лицевая пластина ксеноса неподвижна, но игра теней придает ей иллюзию торжествующей гримасы.{/n}

"The naivety of the lowly... is boundless. He hungered... for knowledge. He... stole my instrument. He... destroyed the other... and awakened the sleeping ones." {n}The xenos's metal faceplate does not move, but the play of shadows upon it gives the illusion of a solemn frown.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Наивность низших... безгранична. Он алкал... знаний. Он... присвоил мой инструмент. Он... погубил второго... и пробудил... спящих". {n}Металлическая лицевая пластина ксеноса неподвижна, но игра теней придает ей иллюзию торжествующей гримасы.{/n}

He... destroyed the other... and awakened the sleeping ones." {n}The xenos's metal faceplate does not move, but the play of shadows upon it gives the illusion of a solemn frown.{/n}

"The naivety of the lowly... is boundless. He hungered... for knowledge. He... stole my instrument. He... destroyed the other... and awakened the sleeping ones." {n}The xenos's metal faceplate does not move, but the play of shadows upon it gives the illusion of a solemn frown.{/n}

"The naivety of the lowly... is boundless. He hungered... for knowledge. He... stole my instrument. He... destroyed the other... and awakened the sleeping ones." {n}The xenos's metal faceplate does not move, but the play of shadows upon it gives the illusion of a solemn frown.{/n}

languages.text: “卑贱者的天真……无边无际。他……渴望……知识。他……偷走……我的仪器。他……毁掉了……另一位……还唤醒了……沉睡者。”{n}异形的金属面甲纹丝不动，但其上流幻的阴影却仿佛勾勒出了阴沉的面庞。{/n}
languages.original_text: "The naivety of the lowly... is boundless. He hungered... for knowledge. He... stole my instrument. He... destroyed the other... and awakened the sleeping ones." {n}The xenos's metal faceplate does not move, but the play of shadows upon it gives the illusion of a solemn frown.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “卑贱者的天真……无边无际。他……渴望……知识。他……偷走……我的仪器。他……毁掉了……另一位……还唤醒了……沉睡者。”{n}异形的金属面甲纹丝不动，但其上流幻的阴影却仿佛勾勒出了阴沉的面庞。{/n}

languages.text: «La ingenuidad de los indignos... no conoce límites. Ansiaba... conocimiento. Él... robó mi instrumento. Destruyó al resto... y despertó a los durmientes». {n}La placa frontal del xenos se mantiene inmóvil, pero las sombras que la cubren dan la ilusión de un ceño fruncido.{/n}
languages.original_text: "The naivety of the lowly... is boundless. He hungered... for knowledge. He... stole my instrument. He... destroyed the other... and awakened the sleeping ones." {n}The xenos's metal faceplate does not move, but the play of shadows upon it gives the illusion of a solemn frown.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «La ingenuidad de los indignos... no conoce límites. Ansiaba... conocimiento. Él... robó mi instrumento. Destruyó al resto... y despertó a los durmientes». {n}La placa frontal del xenos se mantiene inmóvil, pero las sombras que la cubren dan la ilusión de un ceño fruncido.{/n}

languages.text: « La naïveté des créatures inférieures... est sans limites. Il a avidement... cherché le savoir. Il a... volé mon instrument. Il a... détruit l'autre... et réveillé les âmes endormies. » {n}Le masque métallique qui recouvre le visage du xénos reste immobile, mais les ombres qui s'animent à sa surface lui donnent un faux air solennel.{/n}
languages.original_text: "The naivety of the lowly... is boundless. He hungered... for knowledge. He... stole my instrument. He... destroyed the other... and awakened the sleeping ones." {n}The xenos's metal faceplate does not move, but the play of shadows upon it gives the illusion of a solemn frown.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « La naïveté des créatures inférieures... est sans limites. Il a avidement... cherché le savoir. Il a... volé mon instrument. Il a... détruit l'autre... et réveillé les âmes endormies. » {n}Le masque métallique qui recouvre le visage du xénos reste immobile, mais les ombres qui s'animent à sa surface lui donnent un faux air solennel.{/n}

languages.text: "Adi olanın saflığı... Sınırsız. İrfana... Açtı. Aletimi... Çaldı. Ötekini... yok etti... Uyuyanları uyandırdı." {n}Zenonun metal yüz plakası hareket etmiyor ama üzerindeki gölge oyunları, ciddi bir kaş çatma yanılsaması veriyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "The naivety of the lowly... is boundless. He hungered... for knowledge. He... stole my instrument. He... destroyed the other... and awakened the sleeping ones." {n}The xenos's metal faceplate does not move, but the play of shadows upon it gives the illusion of a solemn frown.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Adi olanın saflığı... Sınırsız. İrfana... Açtı. Aletimi... Çaldı. Ötekini... yok etti... Uyuyanları uyandırdı." {n}Zenonun metal yüz plakası hareket etmiyor ama üzerindeki gölge oyunları, ciddi bir kaş çatma yanılsaması veriyor.{/n}

languages.text: "Die Naivität der Niederen ... ist grenzenlos. Er hungerte ... nach Wissen. Er ... stahl mein Werkzeug. Er ... zerstörte den anderen ... und erweckte die Schläfer." {n}Die metallene Gesichtsblende des Xenos bewegt sich nicht, aber das Schattenspiel darauf gleicht einem Stirnrunzeln.{/n}
languages.original_text: "The naivety of the lowly... is boundless. He hungered... for knowledge. He... stole my instrument. He... destroyed the other... and awakened the sleeping ones." {n}The xenos's metal faceplate does not move, but the play of shadows upon it gives the illusion of a solemn frown.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Die Naivität der Niederen ... ist grenzenlos. Er hungerte ... nach Wissen. Er ... stahl mein Werkzeug. Er ... zerstörte den anderen ... und erweckte die Schläfer." {n}Die metallene Gesichtsblende des Xenos bewegt sich nicht, aber das Schattenspiel darauf gleicht einem Stirnrunzeln.

languages.text: 「卑しい者の無知は尽きない。彼は知識を渇望し…私の楽器を盗み…他の者を破壊し…眠っていたものを目覚めさせた。」{n}異形の金属製の顔板は動かないが、影の動きが重苦しい眉を寄せるように見える。{/n}
